title: seqeralabs/nf-proteindesign - Design mode samplesheet schema
description: Schema for validating samplesheets in design mode where pre-made design YAML files are provided

sample_id.errorMessage: Sample ID must be alphanumeric with underscores or hyphens only

design_yaml.errorMessage: Design YAML must be a valid file path ending in .yaml or .yml

structure_files.errorMessage: Structure files must be a comma-separated list of PDB/CIF file paths (e.g., '2VSM.cif' or 'protein1.pdb,protein2.cif')

protocol.errorMessage: Protocol must be one of: protein-anything, peptide-anything, protein-small_molecule, nanobody-anything

num_designs.errorMessage: Number of designs must be a positive integer

budget.errorMessage: Budget must be a positive integer

reuse.errorMessage: Reuse must be true or false

target_msa.errorMessage: Target MSA must be a valid file path to a pre-computed MSA file (e.g., 'target.a3m' or 'target_msa.fasta')

target_sequence.errorMessage: Target sequence must be a valid file path to a FASTA file containing the target protein sequence

target_template.errorMessage: Target template must be a valid file path to a CIF file (e.g., 'target_structure.cif')

boltzgen_output_dir.errorMessage: Boltzgen output directory must be a valid directory path to pre-computed Boltzgen results (e.g., 'results/sample1/boltzgen/sample1_output')
